title: Scoping: head-to-head UQ-baseline benchmark of the calibrated trust layer
premise: External prior-art comparison (NOT self-concordance): hold the base HGBR point predictor fixed where possible, swap the uncertainty method, measure CALIBRATION quality on donor-blocked (LODO) held-out prediction. Powered by ~2591 reproducible perturbations / 58,558 rows.

tier_A_wrapper_swap_zero_install.note: Purest apples-to-apples: identical HGBR point predictions, only the uncertainty band differs. Cleanest test of calibration quality.
methods: parametric Gaussian residual intervals (pred +/- z*sigma_calib) — classic naive prior art
conformalized quantile regression / CQR (Romano 2019) — strongest competitor, keeps guarantee + adaptive width

tier_B_model_native_light_install.note: Same GBT family but native uncertainty; NGBoost is pip-light, jackknife+/CV+ and RF variance are zero-install.
methods: jackknife+ / CV+ (Barber 2021) — K=10 HGBR refits, coverage guarantee, zero install
random-forest / GBT-ensemble variance (per-member spread) — zero install
NGBoost probabilistic GBT (Duan 2020) — mean+variance, light pip install

tier_C_different_base_model_heavy_instal.note: Different base predictor (NN/GP) — semi-apples; include as the Bayesian-approx family for completeness, caveat the model confound.
methods: Gaussian-process variance (sklearn GP on ~1-2k subsample, zero install; sparse/GPyTorch for full n)

recommended_runnable_set: MC-dropout MLP + deep ensemble (optional, torch — caveat different base model)

powered_comparison_design.surface: Donor-blocked LODO (4 donors, 6 pairs, ~2591 reproducible-core perturbations, 58,558 test rows). Runs on cached residuals/feature table — no 16GB re-stream needed.
powered_comparison_design.predictor_control: Tier-A/B keep the SAME HGBR point predictions; only the interval/score differs -> isolates calibration quality, not point accuracy.
primary_metrics: Interval/Winkler score + CRPS (single scalar rewarding calibration AND sharpness jointly) — primary
Marginal coverage error |emp - nominal| at 80/90/95% (conformal ~guaranteed; quantifies how badly non-conformal methods miscover under donor shift)
Interval efficiency: mean width at MATCHED coverage (the genuinely contested axis; adaptive methods can be sharper)
Conditional coverage: worst-slice gap over baseMean/n_cells deciles (Mondrian's claimed 15x-tightening advantage)
powered_comparison_design.n_and_cis: Cluster (block) bootstrap over the ~2591 genes for CIs on every paired metric delta (paired: same test points, method A vs B). Report the 4-fold spread as the conservative honest uncertainty (rows are non-independent; row-level CIs are overconfident per the existing receipt). Paired deltas over thousands of points give tight CIs -> this is the ONE axis where n is genuinely powered.
powered_comparison_design.win_definition: Trust layer on the efficient frontier: guaranteed nominal coverage AND competitive-or-best interval/CRPS score AND best worst-slice conditional coverage, while (a) non-conformal methods matching its width MISCOVER under donor shift and (b) methods matching its coverage are WIDER. Delta CIs exclude the tie.
powered_comparison_design.null_or_loss_definition: Report honestly if it lands: CQR (also conformal) Pareto-dominates split-conformal on width at equal coverage (within-paradigm loss, still informative); or a non-conformal method matches coverage AND width (guarantee adds no empirical value here); or CRPS deltas' bootstrap CIs straddle zero (no powered separation).
powered_comparison_design.tautology_guard: Do NOT headline 'conformal hits coverage' (true by construction). Headline the CONTESTED axes: efficiency-at-matched-coverage, worst-slice conditional coverage, AURC, and the magnitude of non-conformal miscoverage under donor shift.

feasibility.compute: 8GB laptop CPU sufficient for Tier A+B (seconds-to-minutes; 5 features, ~16k train rows). GP needs subsample; torch NN family needs ~min install. No 16GB re-stream (cached preds).
feasibility.engineering: ~1-2 days: most scaffolding exists (proper_scoring_panel.py already computes CRPS/PIT/reliability/sharpness; conformal + Mondrian committed).
feasibility.data_leakage_risk: Low — reuse frozen LODO splits; each method calibrated only on calibration pairs, scored only on held-out-donor test pairs.

honest_merit_assessment.what_it_is: A rigorous, powered, EXTERNAL (prior-art) methods benchmark on a new domain (donor-generalization UQ in CD4+ T-cell Perturb-seq). Confirms known conformal theory (Vovk/Lei/Barber/Romano/Angelopoulos-Bates) on new data.
honest_merit_assessment.novelty_ceiling: The RESULT direction (distribution-free conformal is best-calibrated under shift vs parametric/Bayesian-approx UQ) is theoretically EXPECTED and well-established -> low novelty on the method itself. Novelty is in the DOMAIN application and the decision-layer framing, not new UQ science.
honest_merit_assessment.merit_tier_if_clean_powered_win: Lifts the METHODS spine into the low end of 'solid incremental methods, well-powered' (65-79 band) FOR THE CALIBRATION CLAIM specifically. But as a stand-alone lever it sits at the FLOOR of incremental (confirms expected behavior), not the middle.
honest_merit_assessment.why_it_cannot_alone_deliver_+20: 72 requires the SCIENCE (biological validation) to be well-powered and at least incrementally novel. This benchmark validates the calibration machinery, NOT the biology. It removes a reviewer objection ('did simpler UQ do as well?') and raises the credibility FLOOR, but adds no novel field-changing science and no biological validation (the axes that are underpowered: n=7/8/24). It is a ceiling-raiser for RIGOR, not for NOVELTY.
honest_merit_assessment.realistic_point_gain_this_lever: +3 to +6 (converts a soft 'we used conformal, trust us' into a hard 'conformal is measurably best-calibrated vs 5-6 prior-art UQ methods, with CIs, on held-out donors'). Compounds with other legitimate levers but does not carry +20 alone.
honest_merit_assessment.placement_vs_merit: HIGH placement value (a clean UQ benchmark table with CIs is a strong, defensible demo slide and directly on-thesis) but MODEST merit value (confirms known theory). These are different axes.
